title: Business card scanner
excerpt: Hello, I would like to know how we can scan the business cards using Monday mobile app and update the contacts board with the Monday CRM application. Any one already done this can please help out. Thanks.

posts.author: Brindha (Brindha Aangarai Venkataraman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to know how we can scan the business cards using Monday mobile app and update the contacts board with the Monday CRM application. Any one already done this can please help out. Thanks.

posts.author: rasarch (Rachel Story)
posts.cookedHtml:
I could use this too.
Also a way to scan contact details from email signatures would be great too!

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rachel and Brindha - happy to share that we just released Business Card Scanner that is now available in the app marketplace!
You can read more at: https://deview-studios.com/business-card-scanner-for-monday-com/

posts.author: peggy (Peggy)
posts.cookedHtml: check out our latest product: Avatalk, as the first and only AI-powered digital business card.
